items.idea: Make the operator a proper Claude Code slash command skill that can be invoked via / command — the entire experience should live within Claude Code, not require a bash launcher for default mode
items.notes: Completed in cycle 1. Skill renamed to 'decide', invocable via /decide. PRD-001.

items.idea: Add a README.md with installation instructions, usage guide, and examples
items.notes: Completed in cycle 5 with PRD-005. 132-line README with install, quick start, modes, phases, and structure.

items.idea: Add .gitignore file
items.notes: Security auditor flagged: memory.json and cycle logs with sensitive data will be committed on git add . Bumped priority.

items.idea: Add cost awareness / token budget tracking for subagent dispatches
items.notes: 7 parallel research agents per cycle could be expensive. Analytics agent confirmed: no cycle timing exists.

items.idea: Add state file versioning/migration strategy for schema changes between versions
End-to-end test against a real target codebase to validate the full cycle works
items.notes: Critical for launch confidence but depends on BL-001 being done first

items.idea: Fix force mode launcher to load full SKILL.md instructions instead of a one-line prompt — currently bypasses all guardrails and constraints
items.notes: Completed in cycle 2 with PRD-002. Launcher rewritten with temp file prompt construction, heredoc-based SKILL.md loading, paused state handling, and max-cycles limit.

items.idea: Add backlog inspection, status, and history commands — users can't see what the operator knows or has done without reading JSON files
items.notes: Convergence: product gap + customer value. Key for trust and retention.

items.idea: Add session re-entry for collaborate phase — if user closes Claude Code mid-conversation, next invocation should restore context and resume
items.notes: Convergence: product gap + customer value.

items.idea: Validate state.json before phase routing — check phase enum, mode enum, current_prd path containment. Prevents phase injection and path traversal.
items.notes: Convergence: security + code auditor. Small effort, high impact. Cycle 2 code auditor: also add fallback handling for unrecognized phase values.

items.idea: Add cycle timing, per-agent research stats, and structured feedback outcomes to cycle logs
items.notes: Analytics agent: currently impossible to know phase durations, agent contribution, or PRD acceptance rates.

items.idea: Remove 'validate' from phase enum in state-templates.md (it's folded into execute) and handle 'paused' state in launcher
items.notes: Code auditor: validate phase is undefined, paused state causes infinite re-invocation loop in launcher.

items.idea: Store priority scoring rationale alongside each backlog item and surface it during collaboration
items.notes: Convergence: customer value + experimentation. Reduces black-box feeling.

items.idea: Add persistent stuck event history (stuck_history.json) — currently stuck events are ephemeral and deleted on resolution
items.notes: Analytics: biggest reliability blind spot.

items.idea: Add memory update command and operator inbox for async context injection post-onboarding
items.notes: Product gap + customer value: memory is write-once, operator context drifts from reality.

items.idea: Wrap template variables in XML tags for prompt injection safety and add restricted_paths to memory.json
items.notes: Security: medium severity injection risk via backlog content in subagent prompts.

items.idea: Transition backlog items to 'proposed' status during propose phase and extract meta-research prompt to separate file
items.notes: Code auditor: prevents duplicate PRD on restart, follows prompt externalization pattern.

items.idea: Add onboarding save-and-resume and execution checkpoint for interrupted sessions
items.notes: Customer value: interrupted onboarding restarts from scratch, interrupted execution redoes work.

items.idea: Add git branch isolation — each execution cycle runs on a dated branch, optionally opens draft PR
items.notes: Market research: rollback/undo is table stakes for 2026 autonomous coding tools.

items.idea: Add onboarding confirmation step — show summary of what was captured before starting first research cycle
items.notes: Product gap: users have no chance to correct mistakes before first cycle starts.

items.idea: Fix critical shell injection in launcher.sh — SKILL_CONTENTS variable interpolated unquoted into claude -p command allows arbitrary command execution
items.notes: Completed in cycle 2 with PRD-002 (combined with BL-007). Shell injection eliminated via heredoc with single-quoted delimiter.

items.idea: Quick onboarding mode — infer answers from repo analysis, reduce mandatory questions from 11 to 3-4 confirmations
items.notes: Completed in cycle 3 with PRD-003. Onboarding now uses confidence-scored summary table with fallback to full interview.

items.idea: Add progress indicators during long-running phases — show which phase is active, agent dispatch status, and phase completion
items.notes: Completed in cycle 4 with PRD-004. Phase banners, dispatch status, synthesis summaries, and transition markers added to all phases.

items.idea: Publish to Claude Code skills marketplace for discoverability
items.notes: Completed in cycle 8 with PRD-008. Plugin metadata enhanced, marketplace.json created, README updated with /plugin install as primary method.

items.idea: Add installation mechanism — install.sh script or npx command for going from GitHub to running /decide in under 60 seconds
items.notes: Completed outside operator cycle. install.sh created manually, copies skills from repo to ~/.claude/skills/. Documented in README (PRD-005).

items.idea: Pre-flight check for superpowers plugin dependency during onboarding — verify brainstorming, writing-plans, and executing-plans skills exist before proceeding
items.notes: Completed in cycle 6 with PRD-006. Checks available skills list in system context, warns if missing, does not block.

items.idea: Adaptive research agent selection — dispatch 3-5 agents per cycle based on codebase type and product stage instead of all 7
items.notes: Completed in cycle 7 with PRD-007. 2 core agents always + 5 conditional based on product context.

items.idea: Add /decide reset command for clean re-onboarding — confirm with user, remove .claude-operator/, optionally preserve backlog
items.notes: Product gap: no way to uninstall, reset, or start fresh. Missing CRUD — has create (onboarding) but no delete.

items.idea: Confidence-gated auto-approval — auto-approve PRDs above user-defined trust threshold, creating a middle ground between force and default mode
items.notes: Convergence: customer value + experimentation. Binary force/default loses users who want oversight but not on every cycle.

items.idea: Post-execution satisfaction signal — ask user to rate cycle output, use ratings to calibrate priority scoring in future cycles
items.notes: Convergence: customer value + experimentation. No feedback loop — operator cannot learn whether output was valuable.

items.idea: Add /decide rollback command — read last cycle log commit hash, offer git revert, mark backlog item as rejected
items.notes: Convergence: product gap + customer value. Distinct from BL-019 (branch isolation prevents problem, rollback fixes after the fact).

items.idea: Inject user collaboration feedback into execution subagent prompt — nuanced approval conditions are currently lost in handoff
items.notes: Customer value: 'yes but keep API backward compatible' feedback not passed to execution agent. Only PRD contents and memory are injected.

items.idea: Add objective success metrics per execution cycle — test coverage delta, lint errors, bundle size — for verifiable improvement (Karpathy Loop pattern)
items.notes: Market research: Karpathy autoresearch loop succeeds because each iteration has measurable criteria. Currently only 'did it compile' verification.

items.idea: Add /decide stats command — aggregate cycle metrics: total cycles, success rate, top research agents, PRD acceptance rate, backlog velocity
items.notes: Analytics: distinct from BL-008 (backlog inspection). This computes aggregate metrics across all cycle logs. 20+ cycles = 20+ JSON files to read manually.

items.idea: Sanitize backlog content before re-injection into research prompts — break circular prompt injection chain where one compromised cycle poisons all future cycles
items.notes: Security high severity. Distinct from BL-016 (XML tag wrapping) — this is about the circular re-injection amplification pattern across cycles.

items.idea: Sanitize PRD filenames — strip path separators and enforce strict naming pattern to prevent path traversal during PRD write and read
items.notes: Security high severity. Feature name from research agent output used unsanitized as filename. Small effort fix.
